policy_gates.evidence: This module only creates a guarded re-enable plan and writes report outputs.

The previous reactivation gate is required as prerequisite context.
No runtime enable, launcher, runtime patch, or execution command is performed.
old_short restoration planning cannot authorize capital, live trading, or real orders.
The repo contains old_short references sufficient to build a patch preview in a later module.

reason: Manual approval allows planning only. This module identified the old_short control surface and produced a guarded monitoring/active-paper restoration plan, while keeping runtime enable, launcher, patch apply, capital, live, and real orders blocked.
